evidence.narrative: D1 — Design Problem Statement. Scored Proficient on all 5 criteria (learner specificity, context constraints, measurable shift, evidence of the problem, revision response). Includes tracked-changes revision based on peer feedback.
evidence.name: D1 · Design Problem Statement

evidence.narrative: D2 — Objective × Mechanic Crosswalk. 3 objectives + 1 declined row. Proficient on all 5 criteria. Every row cites a D1 context constraint.
evidence.name: D2 · Objective × Mechanic Crosswalk

evidence.narrative: D3 — Paper Prototype + Facilitator Guide. A non-author ran the full loop from the guide in 4 minutes. Iteration log covers 4 cycles including one reverted change.
evidence.name: D3 · Paper Prototype + Facilitator Guide

evidence.narrative: D4 — Playtest Report. Four target-learner sessions. Proficient on all 5 criteria including observation-vs-interpretation separation. Backlog includes a declined item with re-entry condition.
evidence.name: D4 · Playtest Report

evidence.narrative: D5 — Implementation Spec. State machine, event map, Three.js bridge for one hero scene, and Known Limits annex drawn from the S11 backlog. Coherent citation of D1–D4 across all decisions.
evidence.name: D5 · Implementation Spec
